sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15698" key="a)rtistomi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρτι-στομία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n15698.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">distinctness</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">precision in speech,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:150" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.150</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
